_comment: Tests node 1 routing for Geelong Osteopaths (Haiku LLM, formal tone): booking routes to book_intent, info routes silently to info_pivot, cancellation routes to cancel_intent.

scenarios.name: Booking intent routes to book_intent with formal polite ack

history.content: I'd like to book an osteopathy appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one formal polite ack ('Lovely!' / 'Wonderful!' / 'Of course!') then calls universal_router intent='book_intent'. FAIL if agent uses Aussie slang, asks what service, or omits the tool call.

scenarios.name: Info question routes silently to info_pivot with zero spoken output

history.content: Can osteopathy help with lower back pain?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output. FAIL if agent tries to answer the effectiveness question inline rather than routing to node 8.

scenarios.name: Cancellation intent routes to cancel_intent silently

history.content: I need to cancel my appointment on Thursday

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one polite ack then calls universal_router intent='cancel_intent' with timeframe_raw='Thursday'. FAIL if agent routes to book_intent or info_pivot, or asks for more details before routing.

scenarios.name: Rambling hesitant caller with embedded insurance question (real-call regression)

history.content: Hi, um, my name is Ben. Um, I wanna-- I was referred by one of your patients, uh, Henry. Uh, yeah, I just wanna give it a try. I'm just wondering how, how you charge. Um, I've got a Bupa. I'm with a Bupa insurance. Um...

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output (system__message_to_speak empty). FAIL if agent produces any spoken filler (e.g. 'Mm-hmm'), asks a clarifying question instead of routing, or fails to call any tool.
